Skip to contents
rmoriebricklayer 0.1.0
  • Reference
Tools for building brick-proof, reproducible data bundles. Resolves open-data sources through CKAN package_show and package_search endpoints, records and verifies provenance with SHA256 digests and Wayback Machine snapshots, validates downloaded data against a pinned schema, and falls back to schema-driven synthetic data when the real source is unreachable. Run records are captured in a manifest plus a plain-language summary so any result can be traced back to its inputs.
